explore.description: Investigate n8n nodes, templates, existing workflows
explore.instructions: Read-only mode. Use n8n-mcp to search nodes, list workflows, fetch templates. Do NOT modify workflows or deploy.

plan.description: Create change proposal for new workflow
plan.instructions: Create OpenSpec change in openspec/changes/<id>/ with proposal.md, design.md, tasks.md. Write ONLY inside openspec/.

build.instructions: Create workflow.json in workflows/<name>/. Use n8n-mcp to assist. Test via n8n UI before deploying.

deploy.description: Deploy workflow to n8n via API, validate
deploy.instructions: Run deploy-workflow.sh. Verify workflow appears in UI. Test execution. NEVER deploy without testing in UI first.

archive.instructions: Move change to archive/, update openspec/specs/. Commit with conventional commit message.
